title: RETROSPEC Relationship
description: Schema for edges in the RETROSPEC knowledge graph. Relationships connect entities (people, organizations, models, events, concepts) to form traversable graphs.

source.description: ID of the source entity (person_, org_, model_, evt_, concept_)

relationship_type.description: The type of relationship between source and target

weight.description: Strength of the relationship. 1.0 = direct/strong, 0.1 = weak/indirect

description.description: Human-readable description of this specific relationship

bidirectional.description: Whether this relationship applies in both directions

epoch.description: The epoch in which this relationship was established
